Example condition

Example condition is a common problem affecting many people worldwide.

Symptoms

The main symptoms include tiredness and irregular periods that persist.

  • heavy bleeding during periods

  • pain in the lower tummy

When to see a GP

See a GP if these symptoms are affecting your daily life significantly.

Urgent advice

Call 999 if you have sudden severe pain and feel faint or collapse.

Tiny

Too short.
